https://vulners.com/githubexploit/B7EACB4F-A5CF-5C5A-809F-E03CCE2AB150 *EXPLOIT* 4C6E2182-0E99-5626-83F6-1646DD648C57 3.6 https://vulners.com/githubexploit/4C6E2182-0E99-5626-83F6-1646DD648C57 *EXPLOIT*
The SMTP server is not Exim: NOT VULNERABLE

VULNERABLE: Anonymous Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange MitM Vulnerability State: VULNERABLE Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use anonymous Diffie-Hellman key exchange only provide protection against passive eavesdropping, and are vulnerable to active man-in-the-middle attacks which could completely compromise the confidentiality and integrity of any data exchanged over the resulting session. Check results: ANONYMOUS DH GROUP 1 Cipher Suite: TLS_DH_anon_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA Modulus Type: Safe prime Modulus Source: RFC3526/Oakley Group 15 Modulus Length: 3072 Generator Length: 8 Public Key Length: 3072 ANONYMOUS DH GROUP 2 Cipher Suite: TLS_DH_anon_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256 Modulus Type: Safe prime Modulus Source: RFC2409/Oakley Group 2 Modulus Length: 1024 Generator Length: 8 Public Key Length: 1024 References: https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2246.txt

table.elem: Anonymous Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange MitM Vulnerability

Transport Layer Security (TLS) services that use anonymous Diffie-Hellman key exchange only provide protection against passive eavesdropping, and are vulnerable to active man-in-the-middle attacks which could completely compromise the confidentiality and integrity of any data exchanged over the resulting session.
ANONYMOUS DH GROUP 1 Cipher Suite: TLS_DH_anon_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA Modulus Type: Safe prime Modulus Source: RFC3526/Oakley Group 15 Modulus Length: 3072 Generator Length: 8 Public Key Length: 3072
ANONYMOUS DH GROUP 2 Cipher Suite: TLS_DH_anon_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256 Modulus Type: Safe prime Modulus Source: RFC2409/Oakley Group 2 Modulus Length: 1024 Generator Length: 8 Public Key Length: 1024

script.output: Couldn't find any DOM based XSS.
Couldn't find any stored XSS vulnerabilities.
